product_overview: Que Copado is an online ordering platform for an Argentine burger restaurant that lets customers browse a product catalog, build a cart, and place orders via WhatsApp, while providing an admin panel to manage products, categories, orders, delivery zones, and business settings.
core_goals: Provide a mobile-first, fast product catalog for customers to browse and add items to a persistent cart
Enable customers to complete orders with address/map-based delivery selection, accurate zone-based shipping calculation, and WhatsApp order submission
Give restaurant admins full control over products, categories, orders, delivery zones, and business availability via a protected admin dashboard
Ensure clear validations, real-time feedback, and graceful error handling across public and admin flows

features.name: Product Catalog
features.description: Browse the menu by categories on the homepage, view product details, and add active items to the cart.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See hero section and categories -> See product grid with product cards -> Click category filter tabs -> See filtered products in the grid -> Click "Agregar" button on a product card -> See toast confirming product added to cart -> See floating cart badge increment
Navigate to / -> Click category filter tabs for a category with no active products -> See message indicating no products available

Navigate to / -> See an out-of-stock product card -> Observe out-of-stock state and disabled or hidden "Agregar" button -> Attempt to click "Agregar" (if clickable) -> See error toast stating product is out of stock

features.name: Shopping Cart
features.description: Persistent cart stored in localStorage where customers can view items, adjust quantities, remove items, and proceed to checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to /cart -> See list of items with name, image, unit price, quantity selector, and item subtotal -> Click + button on a cart item -> Quantity increases by 1 -> See item subtotal and cart subtotal update in real time -> Click "Ir al checkout" button -> Navigate to /checkout
Navigate to /cart -> Click - button on a cart item until quantity would go below 1 -> Item is removed from the cart -> See updated subtotal and updated floating cart badge
Navigate to /cart -> Have an empty cart -> See empty cart message and button to go back to catalog -> Observe "Ir al checkout" button disabled

features.name: Checkout with WhatsApp
features.description: Collect customer info, choose delivery or pickup, pick address on a map, calculate shipping using delivery zones, select payment, create the order, and open WhatsApp with a formatted order message.
user_flows: Navigate to /checkout -> Fill in name field -> Fill in phone number field -> Select delivery type Delivery -> Type address in autocomplete field -> Select address suggestion -> See marker placed on map at detected coordinates -> Adjust pin on the map by dragging or clicking -> See address field update from map change -> See detected delivery zone and shipping cost displayed -> Select payment method (e.g., Efectivo) -> Enter cash amount if required -> Review order summary with subtotal, shipping, and total -> Click "Enviar pedido por WhatsApp" button -> See server validate business status and shipping -> See order created on server -> Browser opens https://wa.me/{business_phone}?text={encoded_message} with prefilled order -> Cart is cleared

Navigate to /checkout -> Select Pickup (Retiro) -> Observe address/map fields hidden and shipping set to $0 -> Fill name and phone -> Select payment method -> Click "Enviar pedido por WhatsApp" -> See server create order with pickup type -> Browser opens wa.me link with pickup order details
Navigate to /checkout -> Fill name but leave phone empty -> Click "Enviar pedido por WhatsApp" -> See inline validation error on phone field and prevent submission

Navigate to /checkout -> Enter delivery address outside all delivery zones -> Click "Enviar pedido por WhatsApp" -> See server or client check detect address out of coverage -> See error toast stating address is out of coverage and order is blocked
Navigate to /checkout -> Business is paused or current time outside operating hours -> Attempt to submit order -> See clear message that orders are not accepted and submission is blocked

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Authenticate admins with email and password to access the admin panel.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click "Iniciar Sesion" button -> See authentication request sent -> On success, redirect to /admin/dashboard
Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill email and incorrect password -> Click "Iniciar Sesion" button -> See error toast indicating invalid credentials -> Remain on /admin/login

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Provide KPIs, charts, and recent orders for a quick overview of business performance.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/dashboard -> See KPI cards for total sales, order count, and average ticket -> See sales charts for recent period -> See list of recent orders -> Click sidebar link to /admin/products -> Navigate to /admin/products
Attempt to navigate to /admin/dashboard while not authenticated -> Redirect to /admin/login

features.name: Admin Product Management
features.description: Create, edit, delete, and manage product visibility and stock with image uploads and inline price editing.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/products -> See product table listing all products -> Click "Nuevo Producto" button -> Fill product form fields (name, category, price, image) -> Click Save/Create -> See success toast and new product appears in the table
Navigate to /admin/products -> Click edit on an existing product -> Update fields in the edit form -> Click Save -> See success toast and updated product data in the table
Navigate to /admin/products -> Click price cell to edit price inline -> Enter new price -> Click save/confirm -> See price update in table
Navigate to /admin/products -> Toggle visibility (is_active) on a product -> See product visibility change in table -> Verify product no longer appears on public / if set inactive
Navigate to /admin/products -> Click delete on a product -> See confirmation dialog -> Confirm deletion -> See product removed from table
Navigate to /admin/products -> Submit create product form with missing required fields -> See inline validation errors and prevent submission
Navigate to /admin/products -> Perform a server action that fails (network or Supabase error) -> See error toast stating failed to save product

features.name: Admin Category Management
features.description: Manage categories used to organize products, including create, edit, delete, and sort order.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/categories -> See list of categories with name and sort order -> Click create/new category -> Fill name field -> Click Save -> See new category in the list
Navigate to /admin/categories -> Click edit on a category -> Update name or sort order -> Click Save -> See updated category in the list
Navigate to /admin/categories -> Reorder categories via sort order or drag action -> See new ordering in the list -> Verify category filter order on public / updates accordingly

Navigate to /admin/categories -> Click delete on a category that has products -> See confirmation dialog -> Confirm deletion -> If server prevents deletion due to existing products, see error message explaining the constraint

features.name: Admin Order Management
features.description: View orders, inspect details, and update order statuses with filtering and search.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/orders -> See orders table with status badges and key columns -> Click an order row to open order details drawer -> See customer info, items, shipping cost, and payment method -> Click action to change status to Pagado -> See status badge update and success toast
Navigate to /admin/orders -> Filter orders by status or date range -> See filtered results -> Search by customer name or phone -> See matching orders
Navigate to /admin/orders -> Attempt to update order status but server call fails -> See error toast and status remains unchanged

features.name: Admin Delivery Zones Management
features.description: Draw and manage geographic delivery polygons on a map with shipping cost and free-shipping thresholds.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/delivery-zones -> See interactive Leaflet map with existing zone polygons -> Click draw polygon tool and draw new polygon on map -> Fill zone form (name, shipping cost, free shipping threshold, color) -> Click Save -> See new polygon appear on the map and new zone in the list
Navigate to /admin/delivery-zones -> Edit an existing polygon by dragging vertices -> Click Save -> See updated polygon coordinates persisted
Navigate to /admin/delivery-zones -> Draw a polygon that overlaps an existing active zone -> Click Save -> See validation error indicating zones cannot overlap and prevent saving
Navigate to /admin/delivery-zones -> Create zone with fewer than 3 points or invalid coordinates -> See validation error and prevent saving

features.name: Admin Business Settings
features.description: Configure operating hours, operating days, pause/resume orders, and custom pause messages affecting checkout availability.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/settings -> See current operating hours, operating days, and pause toggle -> Update opening and closing time fields -> Select operating days -> Click Save -> See success toast and settings applied

Navigate to /admin/settings -> Toggle Pause Orders ON and enter a custom pause message -> Click Save -> See pause reflected in settings -> Navigate to /checkout as a customer -> See pause message displayed and orders blocked
Navigate to /admin/settings -> Attempt to save settings with no operating days selected -> See inline validation error requiring at least one operating day

features.name: WhatsApp Integration
features.description: Generate a formatted order message and open WhatsApp with a pre-filled wa.me link to submit the order to the restaurant.
user_flows: Complete checkout happy path -> Server creates order record -> Client receives encoded order message -> Browser opens https://wa.me/{configured_business_number}?text={encoded_message} -> WhatsApp opens with pre-filled order message
Attempt to submit order when business WhatsApp number is not configured -> Click "Enviar pedido por WhatsApp" -> See error toast explaining WhatsApp number is missing and prevent opening wa.me link
Attempt to submit order but server fails to create order -> Click "Enviar pedido por WhatsApp" -> See error toast indicating order creation failed and wa.me link is not opened

routes.description: Public homepage with hero section, promotions, and product catalog grid with category filters
Shopping cart page showing cart items with quantity controls and order summary
Checkout page with delivery form, address autocomplete with map, payment method selection, and WhatsApp order submission
Admin login page with email and password authentication
Admin dashboard with sales statistics, recent orders, and KPI cards
Admin product management with CRUD operations, image upload, and stock toggle
Admin category management with CRUD operations and sort order
Admin order management with status tracking and order details
Admin delivery zone management with map-based polygon drawing and shipping cost configuration
Admin business settings including pause orders toggle and WhatsApp number configuration

features.name: Product Catalog
features.description: Browse products by category with filtering, view product details with images and prices
user_interactions: View all products on the homepage
Click category filter tabs to filter products
Click "Agregar" button on a product card to add it to cart
See product name, price, description, and image

features.name: Shopping Cart
features.description: Persistent cart using Zustand with localStorage, quantity management, and order summary
user_interactions: View items in the cart with quantities and prices
Increase or decrease item quantity with + and - buttons
Remove item from cart
See subtotal and order summary
Click "Ir al checkout" to proceed to checkout
Click "Seguir comprando" to go back to menu

features.name: Checkout with WhatsApp
features.description: Complete order with delivery/pickup selection, address with map, payment method, and send order via WhatsApp
user_interactions: Fill in name and phone number
Select delivery type (Delivery or Retiro/Pickup)
Type address with autocomplete suggestions
Adjust pin on the map for exact location
See detected delivery zone and shipping cost
Select payment method (Efectivo, Transferencia, Mercado Pago)
Enter cash amount if paying with cash
Review order summary with subtotal, shipping, and total
Click "Enviar pedido por WhatsApp" to submit order

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Email/password authentication for admin panel access
user_interactions: Fill email input field
Fill password input field
Click "Iniciar Sesion" button to submit
See error toast on invalid credentials
Redirect to /admin/dashboard on success

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Sales statistics overview with KPIs, charts, and recent orders
user_interactions: View total sales, order count, and average order value KPIs
View sales charts
View list of recent orders
Navigate to other admin sections via sidebar

features.name: Admin Product Management
features.description: CRUD for products including image upload to Supabase Storage, stock and visibility toggles
user_interactions: View list of all products
Click "Nuevo Producto" to add a product
Fill product form (name, description, price, category, image)
Toggle product visibility (is_active)
Toggle out of stock status (is_out_of_stock)
Edit existing product
Delete a product

features.name: Admin Category Management
features.description: CRUD for product categories with sort ordering
user_interactions: View list of all categories
Create new category with name and sort order
Edit existing category
Delete a category

features.name: Admin Order Management
features.description: View and manage customer orders with status updates
user_interactions: View list of all orders with status badges
View order details (items, customer info, delivery address)
Update order status

features.name: Admin Business Settings
features.description: Configure business settings like pause orders toggle and WhatsApp number
user_interactions: Toggle pause/resume accepting orders
Set custom pause message
Configure WhatsApp business number

known_limitations.issue: Store coordinates are hardcoded instead of configurable
known_limitations.impact: Store location for pickup map link uses fixed coordinates

known_limitations.issue: Admin pages use 'as any' to bypass Supabase type checking for business_settings and orders tables
known_limitations.impact: Reduced type safety for these database operations
